markets.question: Spread: Silkeborg IF (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Denmark Superliga game, scheduled for April 5 at 12:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Silkeborg IF" if Silkeborg IF win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FC København".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on superligaen.dk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC København vs. Silkeborg IF - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Denmark Superliga game, scheduled for April 5 at 12:00 PM ET.

markets.question: FC Südtirol vs. Frosinone Calcio: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Serie B game between FC Südtirol and Frosinone Calcio, scheduled for March 22 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC Südtirol and Frosinone Calcio combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on legaserieb.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Serie B game between FC Südtirol and Frosinone Calcio, scheduled for March 22 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both FC Südtirol and Frosinone Calcio each score at least one goal during the game.
